content_body: Thank you for an amazing week! The cabin is so gorgeous and cozy! We made great memories with our children and good friends. We went tubing, hiking to Fall Branch Falls and The Swinging Bridge, Morganton Point, Mercier Orchards, Downtown Blue Ridge, and (of course) Grumpy Old Men Brewing. We all enjoyed ourselves so much and can't wait to come back! Maybe we will return in the winter next year! The kids want to see snow. :) Thanks again!
title: What An Amazing Week!
